Off Calendar May-17-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury, and order to show cause as to plaintiff counsel Kirk Bernard.

Appearances: Maria Torres, plaintiff, Brian O'Hara, Esq. on CourtCall on behalf of defendant Luydmila Lotsvin, and Mr. Kilduff, Esq. specially appearing for Kirk Bernard who was excused by the Court to personally appear as he was in trial.

Plaintiff counsel, Mr. Bernard, has withdrawn as attorney for plaintiff. The Court advised plaintiff to seek counsel, and set this matter for case management conference for June 18, 2004 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 212 for status regarding plaintiff seeking counsel.

Order to show cause as to Mr. Bernard was dissolved.

Hon. Robert Dondero; Clerks: D. Boffi/V. Mu Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce (206)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2004 Continued To May-17-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: At trial call, no appearance by plaintiff. Appearance by defendant. The Court ordered matter off calendar. The plaintiff Maria Torres came late and stated that she believed that plaintiff counsel doesn't want to represent her. As Mr. Bernard is still counsel of record, the Court ordered and order to show cause re: contempt and continued the matter to May 17, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 206. All parties to appear for trial assignment. Notice sent by Court. Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: D.Boffi/V.Mu; Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce CSR #3321 (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., Specially Appearing On Behalf Of Kirk B. Bernard, Moving Party To Be Relieved As Counsel For Plaintiff
RULING:
Hearing held. Court orders Attorney Kirk to file a declaration confirming the information provided to the Court this morning by Attorney Kilduff; upon receipt of the Declaration, the Court will GRANT COUNSEL KIRK B. BERNARD'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Plaintiff Maria Torres. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
